name: University of Delhi
description: The University of Delhi is a premier university of the country with a venerable legacy and international acclaim for highest academic standards, diverse educational programmes, distinguished faculty, illustrious alumni, varied co-curricular activities and modern infrastructure.

name: Manipal Academy of Higher Education
description: Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) is synonymous with excellence in higher education. It is one of India's leading academic and research institutions.

name: Lovely Professional University
description: Lovely Professional University (LPU) is a private university situated on the outskirts of Jalandhar, Punjab. It is the largest single-campus private university in India.

name: Savitribai Phule Pune University
description: Savitribai Phule Pune University, one of the premier universities in India, is popularly known as the 'Oxford of the East'.

name: Chandigarh University
description: Chandigarh University (CU) is a leading Indian Institution offering its students a unique amalgamation of professional and academic excellence.

name: AAFT UNIVERSITY
description: AAFT University, located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, is a multidisciplinary institution known for its focus on media, arts, and professional education. The university combines creative industry expertise with traditional academic curricula to prepare students for diverse career paths.

name: ABHILASHI UNIVERSITY
description: Abhilashi University is a private university located in Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, established by the Abhilashi Educational Society. It offers a diverse range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across fields like engineering, management, pharmacy, and agriculture.

name: ABHYUDAY UNIVERSITY
description: Abhyuday University, located in Khargone, Madhya Pradesh, is a private institution committed to providing quality higher education across various disciplines. The university focuses on skill-based learning and industry-aligned curriculum to prepare students for professional success.

name: Academy of Maritime Education and Training, Chennai
description: Academy of Maritime Education and Training (AMET) is a premier maritime university in India dedicated to education, training, and research in maritime studies. Located in Chengalpattu, it offers specialized programs designed to meet the global standards of the shipping and logistics industry.

name: ACADEMY OF SCIENTIFIC AND INNOVATIVE RESEARCH
description: Academy of Scientific and Innovative Research (AcSIR) is an institution of national importance that focuses on research-driven education in science and technology. It operates through a network of CSIR laboratories across India, offering advanced doctoral and postgraduate programs.

name: Acharya Nagarjuna University, Guntur
description: Acharya Nagarjuna University is a prominent public university located in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, known for its extensive academic offerings and research contributions. It serves a diverse student body across various disciplines including engineering, management, and arts.

name: Acharya Narendra Deva University of Agriculture & Technology, Ayodhya
description: Acharya Narendra Deva University of Agriculture & Technology is a leading agricultural university in Ayodhya, Uttar Pradesh, focused on advancing research and education in agricultural sciences. It plays a pivotal role in regional agricultural development through its diverse academic programs and extension services.

name: Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University, Guntur
description: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) is a premier agricultural university in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, dedicated to excellence in agricultural education, research, and extension. It focuses on enhancing productivity in agriculture and allied sectors through advanced scientific training and innovative farming practices.

name: ADAMAS UNIVERSITY
description: Adamas University is a prominent private university located in Kolkata, West Bengal, offering a diverse range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs. It is known for its sprawling campus, industry-aligned curriculum, and focus on research-driven education.

name: ADANI UNIVERSITY
description: Adani University is a private university located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, established by the Adani Group to provide industry-aligned education. It focuses on research-driven academics across disciplines like engineering, management, and infrastructure.

name: ADESH UNIVERSITY
description: Adesh University is a private university located in Bathinda, Punjab, focusing on medical, paramedical, and professional education. It is known for its extensive healthcare infrastructure and a range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs.

name: ADICHUNCHANAGIRI UNIVERSITY
description: Adichunchanagiri University is a prominent private university located in Mandya, Karnataka, known for its focus on healthcare, technology, and humanities education. It aims to provide quality education and research opportunities through its diverse range of professional programs and state-of-the-art facilities.

name: Adikavi Nannaya University, Rajahmundry, East Godawari
description: Adikavi Nannaya University is a state university located in Rajamahendravaram, Andhra Pradesh, established in 2006. It offers a wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs across various disciplines, focusing on academic excellence and research.

name: Aditya University
description: Aditya University, located in Kakinada, is a prominent private institution in Andhra Pradesh known for its focus on engineering, management, and technology education. name: AGRAWAN HERITAGE UNIVERSITY
description: Agrawan Heritage University is a private institution located in Agra, Uttar Pradesh, offering a diverse range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs. It focuses on providing quality education with an emphasis on practical learning and industry-relevant curriculum.

name: AGRICULTURE UNIVERSITY, JODHPUR
description: Agriculture University, Jodhpur is a premier state agricultural university in Rajasthan focused on research and education in agriculture and allied sciences. name: AGRICULTURE UNIVERSITY, KOTA
description: Agriculture University, Kota is a prominent public agricultural university in Rajasthan dedicated to excellence in agricultural education, research, and extension. It focuses on advancing sustainable farming practices and enhancing rural livelihoods through innovative academic programs.

name: Ahmedabad University
description: Ahmedabad University is a private, non-profit research university known for its interdisciplinary approach and project-based learning. It offers a wide range of undergraduate and graduate programs across various fields including engineering, management, and arts.

name: AIPH UNIVERSITY
description: AIPH University, located in Khordha, Odisha, is a multi-disciplinary institution focused on providing high-quality professional education in public health, management, and technology. name: AISECT UNIVERSITY

name: AKAL UNIVERSITY,BHATINDA

description: Alagappa University is a state-run public university located in Karaikudi, Tamil Nadu, known for its diverse academic programs and research contributions.
